case_title: KGO-AM RADIO,INC., VS. WITI UNLIMITED, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-05-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-19-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KGO-AM RADIO,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WITI UNLIMITED, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,020.65 INTEREST, $227.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,048.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
